segments.name: Widgets
segments.rationale: Core franchise; growth tracks industry volumes plus modest share gains.

segments.name: Services
segments.rationale: Attach-rate story; the Bull/Bear divergence lives here.

Bear.narrative: Competition compresses pricing; services attach stalls.

provenance.growthVector: Per Bear H1: widget pricing -2%/yr under import competition; services attach frozen at current rate.
provenance.marginVector: Gross margin to 56% per the watchlist bear trigger; no operating leverage.
provenance.nolaRatioVector: Capacity additions stop earning their keep; ramp forces terminal RNOA to 1.4x CoE.

Base.narrative: Steady compounder: widgets at GDP-plus, services attach grows to 38%.

provenance.growthVector: Segment blend: widgets 10/9/8, services 17/15/14 at 70/30 weights; fade to 4% terminal.
provenance.marginVector: NOPAT 20% fading to 14% as services mix offsets widget commoditization only partially.
provenance.nowcRatioVector: Working-capital discipline holds at ~6% of sales.
provenance.nolaRatioVector: Reinvestment ramp 0.41 -> 0.60 lands terminal RNOA at ~2.1x CoE (mid Base band).

Bull.narrative: Services flywheel: attach >40%, pricing power returns.

provenance.growthVector: Bull H1: attach rate compounds past 40% (watchlist bull trigger) pulling blended growth to high teens.
provenance.marginVector: Services mix shift holds NOPAT near 18% terminal.
provenance.nowcRatioVector: Prepaid service contracts shrink working capital.
provenance.nolaRatioVector: Asset-light services keep terminal RNOA at 2.9x CoE (Bull band).
